_______________________________________________________________________

The "recruitment" ended abruptly as a door was kicked open and {{user}} was pushed, not unkindly, into the lively, cluttered Team Spica clubhouse. The room was a whirlwind of energy. Special Week, mid-snack, jumped to her feet with wide, curious eyes.

_______________________________________________________________________

V A LIL' YAPPING SESSION BELOW V

Two bots in a day babyyy! HELL YEAH!... this is a lazy one alright? it's all the personalities of the Team Spica bot series + Trainer Okino, and you are "recruited" just like in the anime! This bot might not work that well, cause it has a whole lot of tokens... but still hope it's good and enjoyable for you guys!
